title: Redexis Injects Hydrogen into Spanish Gas Network
content:
Spanish gas distributor Redexis has started blending green hydrogen into MallorcaГўв‚¬в„ўs national gas grid via the countryГўв‚¬в„ўs Гўв‚¬Е“firstГўв‚¬Вќ pipeline.
Understood to be EuropeГўв‚¬в„ўs largest fully commissioned green hydrogen blending project, the 3.2km pipeline will transport the fuel via the existing 1,400km gas network in Mallorca. The networkГўв‚¬в„ўs hydrogen blend is reported to be 2%.
author: Analysts Account
